name: milvuscraft
description: Production toolkit for senior engineers building with and on Milvus — schema design, indexing, search optimisation, multi-tenancy, observability, backup/restore, and diagnostics wired to the official Milvus MCP server.

plugins.name: milvuscraft
plugins.description: 12 specialised skills covering the complete Milvus development lifecycle — from connection and schema design through data ingestion, index tuning, search optimisation, multi-tenancy, compaction/TTL, observability, backup/restore, and diagnostics. Four specialist agents (architect, engineer, operator, diagnostician) and the official Milvus MCP server wired in.
